fixesApplied.description: Search placeholder not showing - Added !important modifiers to override global form CSS: placeholder:text-white/60!, placeholder:opacity-100! (overrides global placeholder:opacity-50), text-white!, rounded-none!, min-h-0!. Changed default placeholder text to 'SEARCH' (uppercase). In PHP, wrapped $searchTitle with strtoupper().

Search box was too tall due to global form CSS applying min-h-12, border, rounded-full, px-4 py-3 to all inputs including type=search. Fixed by adding min-h-0!, p-0!, rounded-none!, bg-transparent!, border-0! with !important to override the global unlayered styles. Only pb-1 is kept for the underline spacing.

Moved the underline from the <form> wrapper to the <input> element. Removed 'border-b border-white pb-1' (desktop) and 'border-b border-white pb-2' (mobile) from the form elements. Added 'border-b! border-white!' to the input elements with pb-1 for subtle spacing. This makes the underline the input's own bottom border.

warnings: Asset size limits exceeded (editor.js 301 KiB, screen bundle 332 KiB) - pre-existing warnings

syncStatus.notes: Both desktop and mobile search forms updated identically in TSX and PHP. Input classes match exactly between both files.
